body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-43826", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-532", "name": "Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File"}], "description": "The OpenSearch logging provider, when configured with a `host` URL that embeds credentials (for example `https://user:password@server.example.com:9200`), wrote the full host URL — including the embedded credentials — into task logs. Any user with task-log read permission could harvest the backend credentials. Users are advised to upgrade to `apache-airflow-providers-opensearch` 1.9.1 or later and, as a defense-in-depth measure, configure the backend credentials via a secret backend rather than embedding them in the `[opensearch] host` URL.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0041, "percentile": 0.32573}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-xccp-97wp-3gjg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-15T17:30:13Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xccp-97wp-3gjg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-xccp-97wp-3gjg"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-43826"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-11T09:16:26Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T09:30:32Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-43826", "https://github.com/apache/airflow/pull/65509", "https://lists.apache.org/thread/bxsrqx1vwssovnwnrvgh9xcosptmf73y", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/05/10/2", "https://github.com/apache/airflow/commit/6a6b6ff409fb48c28bd63482828632a3c5a5bb93", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/apache-airflow-providers-opensearch/PYSEC-2026-23.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-xccp-97wp-3gjg"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/airflow/", "summary": "Apache Airflow Providers OpenSearch: OpenSearch task-log handler leaks credentials embedded in the host URL", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T14:15:13Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-xccp-97wp-3gjg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.9.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "apache-airflow-providers-opensearch"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.9.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Airflow Providers OpenSearch: OpenSearch task-log handler leaks credentials embedded in the host URL
